description: Public discovery metadata for a Pulse voice room.

main.description: A public room listing owned by the room creator. This record is intentionally discoverable and must not contain private membership, invite tokens, call credentials, or ACL state.

createdAt.description: Record creation time in RFC 3339 format.

updatedAt.description: Last meaningful public metadata update time.

visibility.description: Whether anyone can discover the room as public, or the room is listed publicly while admission remains invite-only in Pulse local state.

joinMode.description: Public admission posture. The authoritative ACL remains app-local.

language.description: Primary BCP 47 language tag for the room.

server.description: The Pulse server that currently hosts room signaling and app-local authorization for this room.
